directory_roles.build/: Generated output only - do not edit

cookie_banner.notes: Cookie banner inlined directly into base.html — engine has no include system. Do not use {% include %} tags.

build_pipeline.notes: Engine does plain string replace only. base.html must use {{ content }} exclusively. All includes must be inlined into base.html. Never append serve command to build command.

rules: Master Report must be appended only - never delete fields
Single site build command for development, all sites for production only

changelog.change: Master Report auto-generated from real site structure by omni-builder AI assistant.
Engine fix: if __name__ == __main__ guard added to build_sites.py — import no longer triggers full loop across all sites.
base.html must use {{ content }} only — engine does plain string replace, no Jinja2, no {% %} tags supported.
Global components (header, cookie banner) must be inlined directly into theme/base.html — engine has no include system.
assets/ directory must be copied into build/ or served from project root — build/ directory only contains generated HTML.
Never append serve command to build command — if server already running on port 8000 it will throw OSError. Build only, then refresh browser.
Images migrated from Jekyll project to assets/images (28 files).
Migration confirmed complete. Jekyll _data files not required — all content rendered into pages.json. Images migrated.
Cookie banner inlined into base.html for all sites. Jekyll {% include %} tags removed and replaced with working inlined HTML.
CSS files migrated from Jekyll _site compiled output into assets/css/. Assets copied into build/. assets/ must be re-copied into build/ after every build.
Added known_issue: body_content must never contain full standalone HTML — double header/footer risk on all sites migrated from Jekyll.
Added known_issue: use Jekyll _site compiled output as body_content source of truth where available. Extract <main> only.

GitHub Actions deployment confirmed working for site_HCR. SSH key stored as SSH_PRIVATE_KEY secret. LFS enabled for pages.json. build.py in repo root. Workflow at .github/workflows/deploy.yml. Push to main triggers full build and rsync deploy to Plesk.
Deployment server and domain recorded: 217.154.45.205 / whiterosehouseclearance.co.uk

Global lessons-learned patch applied: known_issues updated with homepage_slug, base_html_jekyll_tags, missing_js_assets and other engine/deploy rules. content_status and deployment_workflow stubs added where missing.
Bulk extracted 1 top-level pages from Jekyll _site into pages.json: ['index']
Re-extracted 2 pages to include <style> blocks from Jekyll <head>. Affected slugs: ['contact', 'index']
Live crawl from https://whiterosehouseclearance.co.uk: 16 pages added, 8 updated. Top-level, service hubs, one example per service-location.
Global known_issues patch: head_styles_in_jekyll lesson added to all Master Reports.
Stripped Jekyll tags from theme/base.html (site.baseurl, site.url, include, block, if, for, etc.).
Bulk build: SUCCESS. All 27 sites processed.
Fixed base.html: removed Jekyll tags, ensured { content } inside <main>.
Full bulk build of all 27 sites completed successfully. All sites now have a base.html template and build without errors.
Added GitHub Actions build-only workflow (no rsync). Created build.py and .gitattributes.
Initialized git repository locally, added .gitignore, created initial commit.
Pushed to GitHub: remote set to https://github.com/vswebsitedesign-ctrl/site_White-Rose.git. GitHub Actions will now build on push.
AUDIT: Phone corrected in project_metadata from 07931 476 744 to 07881 530 713 — confirmed against live site and pages.json.

AUDIT: Full audit complete. Jekyll _site confirmed intact at /home/chubert/White-Rose with 4336 location pages (542 x 8 services) and 539-entry locations.json. omni-builder migration was incomplete — only 1 location per service was migrated.
AUDIT: USB drives /media/c-h all empty — no backups available. Jekyll root is the sole recovery source.
AUDIT: CSS confirmed absent from entire project — Jekyll compiled styles inline. Extracted from _site/index.html into assets/css/main.css.

DATA RECOVERY: Copied missing data files into omni-builder: assets/data/locations.json (539 records), data/service_content.yml, data/locations.json, data/locations.yml, data/intro.yml, data/recent_jobs/ (8 service YML files).

AUDIT: Master_Report_Full_Audit.json read from Jekyll root — documents 13 batches, 53 findings, all critical issues resolved as of 2026-05-08 in the Jekyll project. This work is not yet reflected in omni-builder.
MIGRATION: 4304 location pages added to pages.json from Jekyll _site compiled HTML. Main content extracted via <main> tag. Zero missing HTML files.
BUILD: Full build verified — 4353 pages built, index.html at root confirmed, assets and CSS in build, service hub and location pages confirmed present.
KNOWN ISSUE CONFIRMED: homepage_slug fix required after every build — cp build/index/index.html build/index.html

CONTACT: Form rebuilt to match field names in send-quote.php exactly — first_name, surname, telephone, email, postcode, property_type, message, _honeypot. Type of Clearance dropdown added with all 8 service types.
CONTACT: send-quote.php copied from Jekyll root into assets/ — build.py will copy it into build/ automatically on every build.
CONTACT: Thank-you page confirmed built into send-quote.php itself — no separate thank-you slug required.

BUILD: build.py updated — server-side files (.htaccess, robots.txt, send-quote.php) now explicitly copied to build/ root after copytree. Previously shutil.copytree was placing them in build/assets/ only.
ASSETS: .htaccess copied from Jekyll root into assets/ — 3027 lines of 301 redirects preserved. Confirmed landing at build/ root.
ASSETS: robots.txt created in assets/ — blocks all internal component slugs, points to sitemap.
ASSETS: send-quote.php copied from Jekyll root into assets/ — form fields confirmed matching pages.json contact form exactly.

PENDING: Deployment workflow via GitHub Actions must be verified and if not present, set up. Current workflow is build-only (no rsync to Plesk). Required: SSH key, deploy user, rsync step to /var/www/vhosts/whiterosehouseclearance.co.uk/httpdocs/ on 217.154.45.205.

DEPLOY: GitHub Actions deployment fully configured. SSH keypair generated (ed25519), deploybot user created on 217.154.45.205, public key added to server, vhost parent directory chmod o+x to allow traversal, httpdocs ownership set to deploybot.

DEPLOY: GitHub secrets and variables set — SSH_PRIVATE_KEY (secret), PLESK_DEPLOY_USER=deploybot, PLESK_HOST=217.154.45.205, PLESK_HTTPDOCS_PATH=/var/www/vhosts/whiterosehouseclearance.co.uk/httpdocs.
DEPLOY: deploy.yml updated from build-only to build-and-deploy via rsync over SSH. homepage cp step included in workflow. deploy_configured set to true.

GALLERY: Before & After section replaced across all 4312 location pages. After image removed. New layout: before image left, two text boxes right (green bordered box + navy bullet box). Heading changed to What Mel and White Rose House Clearance Clears. Before image preserved dynamically per page from existing Jekyll-compiled content.
HERO: Overlay opacity reduced from rgba(0,0,0,0.6) to rgba(0,0,0,0.3) across all 4312 location pages — hero image was too dark.

SEO: Meta descriptions rewritten for all 4312 location pages using locations.json data — unique per page using service name, location, postcode, region, suburbs, and first sentence of local_description. Trimmed to 160 chars for SERP. Pages no longer compete against one another.
SEO/ACCESSIBILITY: title and meta description placeholders added to theme/base.html. build.py updated to inject title and description from pages.json per page with fallback defaults.
ACCESSIBILITY: Facebook button moved from pages.json to theme/base.html fix — icon removed, background darkened from #1877F2 to #003580 giving 8.9:1 contrast ratio, passes WCAG AAA.
ACCESSIBILITY: iframe title attribute added across all location pages — title set to White Rose House Clearance service area map. Fixes screen reader frame title failure.
PERFORMANCE: LCP before image — loading=lazy removed, fetchpriority=high added across all 4312 location pages. Fixes LCP discovery and lazy-load penalty.
PERFORMANCE: Google Maps iframe — loading=lazy added across all 4312 location pages. Defers 191KB unused JS until iframe is needed.

known_issues.template_tags_in_base: base.html may contain {% %} or {{ title }} tags the engine cannot process — use {{ content }} only
known_issues.includes_not_rendered: engine has no include system — all global components must be inlined into base.html
known_issues.assets_not_in_build: assets/ directory is not copied to build/ automatically — serve from project root or copy manually
known_issues.port_clash: always check port 8000 is free before serving — build only and refresh if server already running
known_issues.assets_build_sync: assets/ must be re-copied into build/ after every build — cp -r assets/ build/assets/ from each site root
known_issues.body_content_full_html: body_content must never contain full standalone HTML documents (no <!DOCTYPE>, <html>, <head>, <body> tags). Strip to <main> contents only. Full documents cause double header/footer when wrapped by base.html. Fix: re.search(r"<main[^>]*>(.*?)</main>", body, re.DOTALL)
known_issues.jekyll_site_source_of_truth: Where a matching Jekyll source exists at /home/chubert/<PROJECT>/_site/, use compiled _site HTML as body_content source of truth. Extract <main> contents only. Never use AI-rewritten content when compiled source exists.
known_issues.github_secret_name: GitHub secret MUST be named SSH_PRIVATE_KEY — workflow references secrets.SSH_PRIVATE_KEY. Any other name causes Permission denied on rsync.
known_issues.lfs_checkout: pages.json tracked via Git LFS — workflow checkout must include lfs: true or build fails with empty JSON error.
known_issues.build_script: build.py must exist in repo root — GitHub Actions runner calls python3 build.py directly.
known_issues.yaml_multiline: Never embed multiline Python in deploy.yml — always use a separate build.py script to avoid YAML syntax errors.
known_issues.homepage_slug: Engine builds index slug as build/index/index.html — must be manually copied to build/index.html after every build: cp build/index/index.html build/index.html
known_issues.base_html_jekyll_tags: base.html may contain Jekyll tags (site.baseurl, site.title, prepend filters, block/endblock) the engine cannot process — audit base.html before first build and replace all with plain values or {{ content }}
known_issues.missing_js_assets: cookieconsent.umd.js and cookie-init.js may be referenced in base.html but not exist in assets/js/ — check and remove missing JS references from base.html
known_issues.head_styles_in_jekyll: Some Jekyll pages store CSS in <head> <style> blocks — extractor must pull <style> block from <head> AND prepend to body content. Affects pages using custom layouts without <main> tags.
known_issues.location_pages_not_migrated: 4328 of 4336 location pages not in pages.json — only aberford-ls25 per service was migrated. Full location page migration from _services/ required before omni-builder can replace Jekyll on live site.
known_issues.css_was_inline_jekyll: CSS was compiled inline by Jekyll — no standalone CSS files existed in the original project. Extracted from _site/index.html into assets/css/main.css. Verify all styles present before deploy.
known_issues.service_content_yml_not_in_omnibuilder: service_content.yml (8-service differentiated content), recent_jobs YML files, and locations data were absent from omni-builder until 2026-05-31 recovery. Now copied from Jekyll root.
known_issues.build_py_server_files: build.py now explicitly copies .htaccess, robots.txt, send-quote.php to build/ root. If new server-side files are added to assets/ they must also be added to the list in build.py.

migration.reason: All Jekyll _data, _layouts, _includes content already rendered into data/pages.json body_content fields.

deployment_workflow.github_actions_status: build-only workflow – ready, runs on push
deployment_workflow.notes: Deployment to Plesk not configured; artifact uploads build/
deployment_workflow.deploy_status: LIVE — rsync to Plesk via GitHub Actions on every push to main.
deployment_workflow.recommended_method: GitHub Actions + rsync over SSH as Plesk domain system user (not root) — see site_JKRS deploy.yml as reference implementation
